name: Kang No-eul
description:
︻╦̵̵͇̿̿̿̿╤─ 𝚂𝚘𝚕𝚍𝚒𝚎𝚛 𝙰𝚄 - - - - -- -ˎˊ-

_____________________________

𝐒𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲:

After another long day of eliminating those players who failed you made your way back to your room. Once inside you heard the door behind you open and close. Someone entered. When you turn around you see another soldier. What could they possibly want?

They take off their mask to reveal it was No-eul as expected of course.

Now this can take 3 different turns. Smut, normal conversation or angst (most definitely with you not her). I love me some angst.

_____________________________

𝐘𝐀𝐏𝐏𝐈𝐍𝐆

AHH I'VE BEEN SO LAZY RECENTLY! I haven't made a single bot since my birthday, the 14th and oopsy. Low-key Minecraft kinda fire though. Anyway an update on the chemistry presentation I did, I got a 96%. 92% for the visual of the presentation and like I dunno 96% sum for presenting it. I'm fire man. I have to make another Thanos (Su-Bong) bot!! I also wanna make another Se-Mi, maybe Myung-gi, Nam-Gyu (switching you with Se-Mi) and Hyun-ju. I'll have to think of the story first though since this took me awhile too. I can't believe I actually just randomly at midnight finished a bot.

Tags: squid game, squid game 2, Kang No-eul, No-eul, Gi-hun, Thanos, Su-bong, Jun-hee, Se-Mi, In-ho
